positive: A mystical, stylized forest scene printed on a black background. Central composition features a glowing, stylized constellation forming the outline of a mythical deer head. Underneath the constellation, the forest floor shows intricate patterns of bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate roots. Whimsical elements like floating orbs of light drift through the scene. High contrast, vibrant neon-jewel tones (cyan, deep purple, electric blue, lime green) against the dark background. Intricate linework, flat graphic aesthetic combined with subtle gradient glows. Silhouette art style. Highly detailed, clean vector illustration for apparel print.
negative: photo, realistic, blurry, noisy, watermark, text, signature, logo, poor anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, monochrome, grayscales, cluttered, low resolution, out of frame
